# $1^{\circ}$ 多重积分的直接计算法

若函数 $f(x_{1},x_{2},\dots ,x_{n})$ 在由下列不等式确定的有界区域 $\Omega$ 内是连续的：

$$
\left\{ \begin{array}{l} x _ {1} ^ {\prime} \leqslant x _ {1} \leqslant x _ {1} ^ {\prime \prime}, \\ x _ {2} ^ {\prime} (x _ {1}) \leqslant x _ {2} \leqslant x _ {2} ^ {\prime \prime} (x _ {1}) \\ \vdots \\ x _ {n} ^ {\prime} (x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n - 1}) \leqslant x _ {n} \leqslant x _ {n} ^ {\prime \prime} (x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n - 1}), \end{array} \right.
$$

其中 $x_{1}^{\prime}$ 和 $x_{1}^{\prime \prime}$ 为常数， $x_{2}^{\prime}(x_{1}), x_{2}^{\prime \prime}(x_{1}), \cdots, x_{n}^{\prime}(x_{1}, x_{2}, \cdots, x_{n-1}), x_{n}^{\prime \prime}(x_{1}, x_{2}, \cdots, x_{n-1})$ 为连续函数，则相应的多重积分可按下列公式来计算：

$$
\iint_ {\Omega} \dots \int f (x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}) d x _ {1} d x _ {2} \dots d x _ {n} = \int_ {x _ {1} ^ {\prime}} ^ {x _ {1} ^ {\prime \prime}} d x _ {1} \int_ {x _ {1} ^ {\prime} (x _ {1})} ^ {x _ {2} ^ {\prime} (x _ {1})} d x _ {2} \dots \int_ {x _ {n} ^ {\prime} (x _ {1}, \dots , x _ {n - 1})} ^ {x _ {n} ^ {\prime} (x _ {1}, \dots , x _ {n - 1})} f (x _ {1}, x _ {2}, \dots , x _ {n}) d x _ {n}.
$$
